chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl.No.2602 of 2025 Date Order with signature of the Judge Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro. Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz ul Hassan Shah. Warisa..............Vs........................ The State 10.12.2025. Mr. Waqas Ali Choudhry, Advocate for applicant Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Addl. P.G. O R D E R = MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant was arrested on 19.06.2025 by police of P.S. Gadap City from street Khilji Camp, Yasrab Colony, Malir Karachi on suspicious condition and from him 275 grams of Heroin was recovered, hence he was booked in FIR bearing Cr. No.469/2025 U/s 9 6 (B) CNS Act, 2024 of P.S. Gadap City, Malir, Karachi. 2. Learned counsel in defence submits that applicant is the first offender; case has been challaned and punishment of the alleged offence is less than 10 years, hence the offence does not fall within prohibitory clause of section 497 Cr.P.C. 3. On the other hand, learned Addl. P.G. has opposed the bail but submits that applicant is the first offender. 4. We have considered arguments of the parties and perused material available on record. Applicant is the first offender; the offence does not fall within prohibitory clause of section 497 Cr.P.C, and more so since challan has been submitted, applicant is no more required for further investigation. Accordingly, this application is allowed and applicant is granted bail subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trail court. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial.

Accordingly, this application is allowed and applicant is granted bail subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trail court. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE A.K
